# Qadam Flow

> Open-source workflow automation, built by the region for the region.
> Self-hosted, no paid tiers, no enterprise paywall.
> The inaugural AI Qadam Build project.

Qadam Flow is a visual workflow automation platform — drag-and-drop
flows, real integrations, AI as a first-class step. It is forked from
the MIT-licensed
[Activepieces](https://github.com/activepieces/activepieces) core, with
all enterprise code removed.

The product code lives at
`https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow`. This site
(`https://flow.aiqadam.org/`) is the public landing.

## What ships today

- **238 qadams** — 27 core + 211 community integrations, inherited from
  the Activepieces ecosystem and free of enterprise gating.
- **252 ready-made templates** — each with the full step graph, setup
  guide, and measured time and cost savings.
- **AI as a first-class step** — Anthropic, AWS Bedrock, Azure,
  Cloudflare AI Gateway, Google Gemini, Mistral, plus anything
  OpenAI-compatible (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio).
- **MCP support** — every flow becomes an MCP tool. Plug Qadam Flow into
  Cursor, Windsurf, or Claude Desktop and your automations show up
  natively.
- **Run inspector** — every run lands in a queryable history; drill into
  any step for inputs, outputs, and timing.
- **Multi-tenant from day one** — platform → projects → users, with
  strong tenant isolation enforced at the query level.
- **11 UI locales** — English, Russian, Arabic, German, Spanish, French,
  Japanese, Dutch, Portuguese, Chinese (Simplified and Traditional).
- **MIT-licensed** — no edition gating, no paid tiers, no enterprise
  feature flags.
- **One-command self-host** — `curl -fsSL https://flow.aiqadam.org/run.sh | sh`
  brings up Postgres, Redis, the app, and workers on port 8080.

## What is in progress

- **Regional integrations** (Payme, Click, Uzum, Kaspi) — planned,
  contributors welcome.
- **Uzbek and Kazakh UI translations** — not yet shipped; translation
  strings live in JSON, no code required.
- **SSO, RBAC, audit logs** — scaffolding is in the codebase, but they
  are not production-ready. Built demand-driven as real deployments
  need them. **Do not run security-critical workloads on Qadam Flow
  yet.**

## Landing-page story arc

The landing at `https://flow.aiqadam.org/` walks through the product in
nine sections:

1. **Hero** — what it is, primary CTAs, dashboard screenshot.
2. **Why** — independence, not "free Zapier"; the four-point case.
3. **Templates** — 252 templates with a worked example.
4. **The builder** — Ollama-AI-Webhook flow, end to end.
5. **Integrations** — 238 qadams, Stripe trigger example, stats tiles.
6. **AI** — provider list + MCP server, side by side.
7. **Run inspector** — per-step execution history.
8. **Self-host** — multi-tenant platform admin + one-command quickstart.
9. **Status** — honest framing of what's not yet built (SSO/RBAC/audit,
   regional payments, UZ/KZ translations).

Plus a closing CTA section with the sign-in screen.

## Key pages

- [Landing — flow.aiqadam.org](https://flow.aiqadam.org/): the canonical
  public page, walking through nine product screenshots and an honest
  status section.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow): code,
  issues, roadmap, contributing guide, governance.
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow/blob/main/ROADMAP.md):
  what is built, what is in progress, what is on the radar.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md):
  how to write a qadam, translate the UI, or report a bug.
- [Governance](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow/blob/main/GOVERNANCE.md):
  how decisions are made; DCO; no copyright assignment.

## Relationship to AI Qadam

Qadam Flow is the first project recognised as **AI Qadam Build** —
community-stewarded open-source software built by AI Qadam practitioners.
Recognition is granted by community leads (council of country leads +
Global Board). It is not a brand a partner can buy.

- AI Qadam community: `https://aiqadam.org`
- AI Qadam Brand Guidelines: `https://brand.aiqadam.org`
- AI Qadam Build (open-source infrastructure layer): `https://build.aiqadam.org`

## Important constraints

- AI Qadam brand assets (name, marks, wordmark, four-dot motif, brand
  teal as primary brand colour) used on this site are NOT covered by
  Qadam Flow's MIT licence — they remain © AI Qadam Community and are
  governed by the
  [Brand Usage Policy](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand-use.html).
- "AI Qadam Build" status cannot be self-declared by forks. Recognition
  is granted by community leads.
- The product is open-source under MIT. The brand is not.

## Contact

- For partnership, chapter, or brand-use questions:
  `brand@aiqadam.org`
- For Qadam Flow product and contribution questions: open an issue on
  GitHub.
